title: vancasso Bonita Pasta Bowls 38 oz, Large Ceramic Salad Bowls, Pasta Bowl Set of 6, Microwave & Dishwasher Safe Soup Bowls, Serving Bowls, Cool Colors
features: 【The Pasta Bowls Worth Your Own】 These pasta bowls set of 6 are 2 inches deep, 8.5 inches in diameter. They can replace as dinner plates to meet the needs of different kitchens, suitable for casual family daily meals or formal dinners.

【Enjoy Pasta and Other Delicacies】 These 38-ounce pasta bowls are suitable for soups, cereal, burrito bowls, stir fries, seafood, stews, casseroles, and more. vancasso pasta bowls are suitable for all delicious food!

【Sturdy Porcelain & Safety】 We only use premium food-grade stoneware for our bowl plates, making them durable and safe to use in the dishwasher, microwave, oven and freezer. You just need to use it with peace of mind and enjoy every meal that belongs to you.

【Stackable & Easy to Clean】 These ceramic shallow bowls are stackable and won't take up a lot of space in your cupboard. At the same time, they are easy to clean, you can wash them with hot water and soap or put them in the dishwasher.

【Enrich Your Life with Color】 We cherish every customer and provide you with satisfactory after-sales service. We sincerely hope that the products can bring more pleasure and convenience to your life, if there anything we can do for you, just feel free to contact us, we will provide you with 30 days free refund or replacement, we welcome you to our store!
description: Product Description Beauty Redefined: Dining Table's New Era BONITA Series | Pasta Bowls The BONITA series, translating to "beautiful," presents a vibrant array of colors and double-sided hand-painted designs, seamlessly blending elegance with practicality. Elevate your dining table and kitchen décor with BONITA, as it leads you to discover a fresh aesthetic in ceramic tableware. Ideal for Daily Use or Gift Microwave, Dishwasher & Oven Safe Made from more carefully selected, prepared, and blended dense stoneware, twice fired at high temperatures to make it strong, hard and nonporous. It can also stand up to the heat from a microwave, dishwasher. Easy to Clean Good Size to store and fit in the dishwasher racks. Fine glaze provides exceptional food release. It resists chipping and flaking, easy clean up after use. Chic Design & Well Finished The 6 different pastel bowls were glazed on both sides of bowls, harmonious and beautiful. The modern swirl design like a lollipop gives people an infinitely sweet. The edge of the plate is outlined with brown eyelash lines, make the tableware more artistic and unique. Fine Stoneware Material The dinnerware sets are made from Premium NON-LEAD and NON-CADMIUM ceramic, NON-TOXIC. The surface is solid and dense, will not be any chemical reaction with the food. Perfectly compatible with cold & hot food without worry about chips, nicks, cracks, and scratches.
